name: Alchemy + Chaos spam
description: Brute-force a rare amulet by alching once, then chaos-spamming until you hit usable mods. Pure RNG, no guarantees, but cheap per attempt.

steps.verb: Orb of Alchemy on a normal amulet
steps.outcome: Rarity to rare with 4 random mods.
Each Chaos rerolls ALL mods. Average expect ~20 attempts before hitting a 2-good-mod combo. Set a hard budget — don't sink past it.

notes_for_user: Maximum variance — could finish in 3 chaos or 50. Use only if you don't have Essences available or the target mods are wide enough that 'any 2 of N' is fine.
